arts.ttl: Why Real Madrid had scouts present at Girona clash
arts.sum: La Liga giants Real Madrid had scouts in attendance at the club’s weekend meeting with Girona. This came with a view to keeping a watchful eye on the performance of…

arts.ttl: Liverpool press conference LIVE - Arne Slot and Ryan Gravenberch on transfers, contracts and Girona
arts.athr: liverpool.news@trinitymirror.com (Joe Rimmer, Ian Doyle, Paul Gorst)
arts.sum: Live updates from Spain as Arne Slot hosts his Liverpool press conference ahead of the Champions League clash with La Liga side Girona

arts.ttl: Man City's games against Arsenal and Liverpool live on Sky in February
arts.sum: Manchester City's Premier League games with Arsenal and Liverpool are among the 12 matches to be shown live on Sky Sports in February.

arts.ttl: Alisson Becker sends five-word Liverpool message after injury return confirmed
arts.sum: Alisson Becker has been sidelined since suffering a hamstring injury against Crystal Palace in October

arts.ttl: Alisson back in Liverpool squad for Girona clash
arts.sum: Liverpool goalkeeper Alisson Becker could be set to make his first appearance for the club in more than two months when Arne Slot's side take on Girona in the UEFA Champions League on Tuesday night.

arts.ttl: Max Verstappen reveals Liverpool soft spot and opens up on 'sad' Ruben Amorim Man United regret
arts.sum: Max Verstappen may be a huge Manchester United fan, but he has a soft spot for Liverpool and is close to a number of the Dutch players at Anfield

arts.ttl: Liverpool confirm 19-man squad for Girona Champions League clash as Arne Slot receives major boost
arts.sum: Liverpool goalkeeper Alisson Becker is included in the Reds' 19-man travelling squad for their Champions League clash with Girona on Tuesday evening.

arts.ttl: Nicky Hayen would prefer a summer transfer for Liverpool and Chelsea target

arts.ttl: Alisson Becker returns to Liverpool squad for Girona Champions League clash
arts.sum: Diogo Jota was also involved in training on Monday but was not part of the Reds’ 19-man Champions League squad.

arts.ttl: Liverpool's Mac Allister wants TAA to stay
arts.sum: Alexis Mac Allister is hopeful Liverpool teammate Trent Alexander-Arnold will continue at the club next season.
